monster.name: Korex

trait.name: Disengage
trait.text: Korex can disengage as a bonus action

trait.name: Dash
trait.text: Korex can use Dash as a bonus action (doubled speed: 24m / 80ft / 16qd)

trait.name: Poison Immunity
trait.text: Korex is immune to the poisoned condition and poison damage

trait.name: Flauto Magico
trait.text: main weapon. Charm + ranged psychic damage. Devastating against targets with low Wisdom.

trait.name: Rancid Knife
trait.text: backup melee weapon. The poison automatically poisons on hit.

action.name: Rancid Knife (melee)
action.text: Attack: +5, melee Damage: 2d4+3 piercing + 2d6 poison Effect: the target is poisoned until the start of Korex's next turn

action.name: Flauto Magico (action)
action.text: Target: one creature Korex can see within 36m / 120ft / 24qd Saving throw: Wisdom DC 12 Failure: 4d6 psychic damage + charmed until the start of Korex's next turn Success: half damage, no charm

monster.description: Tall, thin, long black hair tied with a stolen silk ribbon. Permanent smile, eyes that never smile. Speaks as if always on stage — melodic voice, theatrical pauses, sweeping gestures. Wears elegant clothes stained with sewer filth. His distinctive trait: he never stops humming, not even when in danger.
